prompt: Turn this into a website: it's a simple portfolio page for a freelance photographer. The design has a white background, black serif font for the name 'Elena Vasquez', a full-width hero image of a camera lens, a grid of 6 portfolio photos, an 'About' section with a headshot and bio paragraph, and a contact form. Make it look clean and editorial.

assertions.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
The exact name 'Elena Vasquez' appears in the output
Page includes a grid of portfolio photos (at least 6 img elements with Unsplash or placeholder URLs)
Page includes a contact form with at least name, email, and message fields
Contact form has JavaScript validation (required fields, email format check)
Page includes an About section with bio content
A serif font is used (Google Fonts import or font-serif Tailwind class)
